rationale: Rewrites artifacts/awdp-site/vercel.json removing the legacy 'version': 2 field and the functions block that was producing the 'Function Runtimes must have a valid version' Vercel error, adds installCommand: 'node vercel-install.cjs' for the pnpm workspace install, and replaces the minimal rewrites set with /api/*, /sitemap.xml, /admin variants, SPA catch-all excluding /api/_next/assets, plus cache headers for /assets/* (immutable) and /resources/*. Every change is described in the PR body. Sits in negatives/closed-without-merge but the diff is technically valid Vercel config matching its stated goal; closure was likely because this approach was superseded by a competing fix on the same project.
